concept: Journey through uncertainty and gradual progress
prompt: Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print, Edo period (1800s), depicting a lone traveler descending a winding mountain path toward a misty valley below, viewed from a high diagonal vantage point in the style of Hokusai's landscape series. Flat areas of unmodulated color with no shading or gradients. Bold black outlines of even weight. Muted indigo, ochre, and pale grey palette with cream paper ground. Strong diagonal composition with the path leading the eye from upper-right to lower-left valley. Visible woodblock texture in the sky. No photographic depth or shadows. No text, no labels, no Western perspective techniques.
tradition_approach: Flat color planes, bold black outlines, muted indigo and ochre palette, diagonal composition, visible woodblock texture, no shading or Western perspective.
